AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Its First Cause Of Action For Specific Performance Of Purchase Option
Off Calendar Oct-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas McConnell, Esq. and Jana Contreras Esq. (925-935-9400) of Miller Starr Regalia for Plaintiff/Moving party Presidio Knolls School, Inc.
Elizabeth Erhardt, Esq.(415-366-6698) and Michelle Landry, Esq. (415-839-1212) of Putterman Logan LLP and for Defendants/opposing party Christopher Joseph Harney, Christina Marino Harney.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court denied the motion procedurally and substantively, there is a triable issue of fact in this instance. Both sides Argue. Plaintiff argues CCP 3.1350(b) and how they meet the burden. Plaintiff argues "not pertinent", good faith language, cites Riverside and Steiner case, and an issue of law. Defendant argues Landsberg.

Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Adjudication is taken under submission. Both sides to submit proposed orders. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
